Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x2208 "THEHOUSETHATJACKBUILT-8000-2208" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $8000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "House Jack Built, The.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $8000 to set the device number of the current file ($BA) to $01 (tape) to allow the game to run properly.
The loading screen is based on the Spectrum version
